name.zh: 中国城市轨道交通协会

description.en: The China Association of Metros (CAMET) is the national industry association representing China's urban rail transit sector, including metro systems, light rail, monorail, tram, and automated people movers. Established in 2000, CAMET compiles and publishes comprehensive statistical data on urban rail transit development across all Chinese cities. Its annual statistical reports cover network mileage, ridership, number of lines and stations, passenger capacity, construction investment, operational safety, and energy consumption. CAMET's data is the authoritative source for tracking the rapid expansion of China's urban rail network and benchmarking city-level metro performance.
description.zh: 中国城市轨道交通协会是代表中国城市轨道交通行业（包括地铁、轻轨、单轨、有轨电车和自动旅客运输系统）的全国性行业协会，成立于2000年。协会汇编并发布全国各城市城市轨道交通发展的综合统计数据，年度统计报告涵盖运营里程、客运量、线路和车站数量、客运能力、建设投资、运营安全及能耗等指标，是跟踪中国城市轨道交通快速扩张和各城市地铁绩效对标的权威数据来源。

en: Network Statistics - Total operational mileage, number of lines and stations across all Chinese cities with metro systems
Ridership Data - Annual and monthly passenger volumes, peak-hour ridership, and system utilization rates by city
Construction Progress - Investment in metro construction, newly completed lines, and lines under construction
Operational Safety - Incident reports, safety performance indicators, and emergency response statistics
Energy Consumption - Electricity consumption per vehicle-kilometer, energy efficiency benchmarks
Fleet Data - Rolling stock inventory, train types, and fleet renewal rates
Financial Performance - Operating revenues, subsidies, and cost recovery ratios for major metro operators
zh: 网络统计 - 全国拥有地铁系统城市的运营总里程、线路数量和车站数量
客运量数据 - 年度和月度客运量、高峰小时客运量及各城市系统利用率
建设进度 - 地铁建设投资、新建成线路及在建线路情况
运营安全 - 事故报告、安全绩效指标和应急响应统计
能耗数据 - 每车公里电耗、能效基准
车辆数据 - 车辆保有量、列车型号和车辆更新率
财务绩效 - 主要地铁运营商的运营收入、补贴及成本回收比率
